title: Create school activities organization website

requirements.text: Create a homepage that displays an overview of upcoming school activities with their dates, times, and locations

quotes: build a website to help organize school activities

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays a list of activities
Each activity shows date, time, and location
Activities are sorted by date with upcoming events first

requirements.text: Implement functionality to create new school activities with fields for title, description, date, time, location, and category (e.g., sports, academic, arts, social)
acceptanceCriteria: Users can access an activity creation form
Form includes all required fields: title, description, date, time, location, category
Activities are saved to the backend
Newly created activities appear in the activity list

requirements.text: Add ability to view detailed information for individual activities including full description, organizer details, and participant count
acceptanceCriteria: Users can click on an activity to view full details
Detail view shows complete activity information
Participant count is displayed and updated

requirements.text: Implement activity registration functionality allowing users to sign up for activities and view their registered activities
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register for an activity
Users can view a list of activities they are registered for
Registration status is persisted in the backend
Users cannot register for the same activity twice

requirements.text: Add filtering and search capabilities to find activities by category, date range, or keyword search
acceptanceCriteria: Users can filter activities by category
Users can filter activities by date range
Users can search activities by keyword
Filters can be combined
Results update in real-time as filters change

requirements.text: Create a calendar view that displays all activities in a monthly grid format with visual indicators for different activity types
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar displays activities in a monthly grid
Activities use different colors or icons based on category
Users can click on calendar dates to view activities for that day
Calendar allows navigation between months

requirements.text: Design a vibrant, education-focused visual theme with warm, energetic colors (oranges, greens, teals), playful typography, and a clean card-based layout that emphasizes clarity and accessibility for school environments
acceptanceCriteria: Visual design uses a cohesive color palette with warm, energetic tones
Typography is clear, friendly, and appropriate for educational context
Layout uses card-based components for organizing information
Design is consistent across all pages and components

constraints: Must use Motoko for backend and React with TypeScript for frontend
Authentication must use Internet Identity only
All state management must use React Query
nonGoals: Real-time chat or messaging between users

required: Cheerful illustration of students collaborating around a calendar or bulletin board, warm color palette with oranges and teals (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Simple icon set for activity categories: sports ball, book, palette, and people icons in consistent style (category-icons.dim_256x256.png)
